data.biography: David Ajala (born 21 May 1986) is a British actor. He is known for his roles as Manchester Black in Supergirl (2018–2019), Captain Roy Eris in Nightflyers (2018), and Cleveland "Book" Booker in Star Trek: Discovery (2020–present).
data.name: David Ajala

data.biography: 大卫·阿贾拉（David Ajala，1986年5月21日-），英国演员。他因在《女超人》（2018-2019 年）中饰演曼彻斯特·布莱克、在《夜行者》（2018 年）中饰演罗伊·埃里斯船长和在《星际迷航：发现号》（2020 年至今）中饰演克利夫兰“书”布克而闻名。
data.name: 大卫·阿贾拉

data.biography: 大衞·阿賈拉（David Ajala，1986 年 5 月 21 日-），英國演員。他因在《女超人》（2018 - 2019 年）中飾演曼徹斯特·布萊克、在《頭條殺機》（2018 年）中飾演羅伊·埃里斯船長和在《星際迷航：發現號》（2020 年至今）中飾演克利夫蘭“書”布克而聞名。
data.name: 大衞·阿賈拉

data.biography:
Ray Panthaki (born 20 January 1979) is a British actor, producer, screenwriter and director best known for the roles he played in Marcella (2016–2020), Away (2020), and the movie Boiling Point (2021), for which he was nominated for the 2021 BIFA for Best Supporting Actor.

Other credits include Tube Tales (1999), Ali G Indahouse (2002), 28 Days Later (2002), Bollywood Queen (2003), Kidulthood (2006), Provoked (2006), Convenience (2013), It's a Wonderful Afterlife (2010), Screwed (2011), Interview with a Hitman (2012), Convenience (2013), Colette (2018), Official Secrets (2019), Gangs of London (2020), and The Serpent Queen (2022).
data.name: Ray Panthaki
